notes: NexusTrade 'Quasar' SMA/RSI oversold mean-reversion. EA runs one instance per universe symbol; each instance additionally reads SP500.DWX on D1 as a regime/proxy gate before taking an entry on its own symbol. Foreign-symbol reads (Bars/iClose/iRSI on the proxy) are bound at call site against the proxy symbol, not the per-instance symbol. One-position-per-magic; no grid.
